'''Voss Parck's grandfather''' was a [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] who received a commission in an unknown [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] and eventually rose to the position of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] [[Parent/Legends|fathered]] at least two children, one of them a son.<ref name="Voss Parck" />

At least one of Parck's children followed in his footsteps, as his [[Voss Parck's father|son]] also became a naval captain. Two of his grandchildren also served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Voss Parck's cousin|one]] becoming a [[Vice Admiral/Legends|vice admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and the other, [[Voss Parck/Legends|Voss Parck]], holding the rank of captain until his promotion to [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] and placement in command of the [[Empire of the Hand]].<ref name="Voss Parck" />
